questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
On what date is Anju's birthday?
Statements: I. X says that her birthday falls sometime in February.
II. Charu says that her birthday falls after 27th of the month.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
On what date is Anju's birthday?
Statements: I. Anju's zodiac sign is Aries.
II. She was born on the first date of a month.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
What is the age of Shyam?
Statements: I. Ram is 50 years old.
II. Shyam is 15 years older than Ram.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
What is the age of Shyam?
Statements: I. Shyam is half as old as Madan.
II. Shyam is twice as old as Sonu, who is 10.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
What is the age of Shyam?
Statements: I. When India got independence Shyam was nine years old.
II. Shyam has just reached the retirement age for public sector employees.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Among three friends A, B and C, who is the tallest?
Statements: I. A is taller than B.
II. A is taller than C.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Among three friends A, B and C, who is the tallest?
Statements: I. A is taller than B.
II. A is shorter than C.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Among three friends A, B and C, who is the shortest?
Statements: I. A is taller than B.
II. B is taller than C.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Among three friends A, B and C, who is the shortest?
Statements: I. A is taller than B.
II. A is shorter than C.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Among three friends A, B and C, who is not the tallest?
Statements: I. A is taller than B.
II. A is shorter than C.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Among three friends A, B and C, who are not the tallest?
Statements: I. A is taller than B.
II. A is taller than C.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Are some Indians hot-blooded?
Statements: I. All hot-blooded men are Indians.
II. Some pencils are flowers.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Are some pens pencils?
Statements: I. Some pencils are flowers.
II. All pencils are pens.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Are all pens flowers?
Statements: I. All pens are potatoes.
II. All flowers are potatoes.
